title: Ethuvarai Pogalam Lyrics
stanzas:
Ethuvarai Pogalam Lyrics in Tamil from Enai Noki Paayum Thota Film. எதுவரை போகலாம் (Ethu varai Pogalam) tamil lyrics is written by Thamarai. Composed by Darbuku Siva and sung by Sid Sriram, Shashaa Tripathi

[display-posts tag="movieenai-nokki-paayum-thotta" posts_per_page="5" layout="list" title="Related Lyrics"]

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Ethuvarai Pogalam?

The song expresses a deep longing and desire to know how far love can go, reflecting the emotional struggles of the characters in the movie.

How does this song fit into the plot of Enai Nokki Paayum Thotta?

This song captures a pivotal moment in the film where the protagonists confront their feelings for each other amidst challenges.

Who are the singers of Ethuvarai Pogalam?

The song is beautifully sung by Shashaa Tirpathi and Sid Sriram, both of whom bring a unique charm to the track.

Who composed the music for Ethuvarai Pogalam?

The music for this enchanting song was composed by Darbuka Siva, known for his innovative soundscapes.

When was Ethuvarai Pogalam released?

The song was released on July 17, 2018, and has since become a favorite among fans of Tamil music.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Ethuvarai Pogalam, the protagonists express their yearning for love and connection, beautifully encapsulated through the heartfelt lyrics penned by Thamarai. The song unfolds during a crucial moment in Enai Nokki Paayum Thotta, where emotions run high and the characters grapple with their feelings. With soothing melodies and a romantic vibe, it evokes a sense of nostalgia and longing. The collaboration between Shashaa Tirpathi and Sid Sriram adds depth to the emotional landscape, making it a memorable piece in Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Ethuvarai Pogalam from Enai Nokki Paayum Thotta is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of longing and love. With the enchanting voices of Shashaa Tirpathi and Sid Sriram, paired with Darbuka Siva's soulful composition, this song is sure to resonate with anyone who has ever felt the bittersweet pangs of romance. Dive into this melodic journey that perfectly blends heartfelt lyrics with captivating music.
stanzaMeanings: I keep asking you how far we can go, and you must tell me. I refrain from touching because you say that only honey and pearls are enough. You wander in dreams every day, and if a man comes in those dreams, it is I. Always, oh, oh, oh, oh, gentle breeze, do not blow here. I am here as a fan, you are standing in my house, and I am unable to believe that you have taken me away.

I do not want big checks or golden palaces; I only wanted you, my life. Yesterday, my speed turned into a small flame, and I fell asleep. My anger turned into dust with the wind, and I could not see you or speak to you; those days are wasted in my life.

Since you came every day, I became a joyful woman, my life. I keep asking you how far we can go, and you must tell me. I refrain from touching because you say that only honey and pearls are enough. Rejecting a young man like you without accepting him is a mistake.
I saw your uniqueness and purity; my eyes speak of your greatness. Oh, oh, oh, oh, gentle breeze, do not blow here. Oh, gentle breeze, do not blow here. I am here as a fan.
I think of you as a flower while you stand in the garden. I have seen the garlands of fame and the honey gardens; why did I come after you?
You are standing in the garden, and I thought of you as a flower and plucked you. I have seen the garlands of fame and the honey sayings; why did I come after you?

I do not want big checks or golden palaces; I only wanted you, my life. Yesterday, my speed turned into a small flame, and I fell asleep. My anger turned into dust with the wind, and I could not see you or speak to you; those days are wasted in my life.

Since you came every day, I became a joyful woman, my life. I keep asking you how far we can go, and you must tell me. I refrain from touching because you say that only honey and pearls are enough. Rejecting a young man like you without accepting him is a mistake.
I saw your uniqueness and purity; my eyes speak of your greatness. Oh, oh, oh, oh, gentle breeze, do not blow here.
